sentences.arabic: تَمْتَازُ اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِجَمَالِ الْبَيَانِ وَدِقَّةِ التَّعْبِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik se odlikuje ljepotom rječitosti i preciznošću izražavanja.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is characterized by the beauty of eloquence and precision of expression.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكُتَّابُ الْمَجَازَ لِتَوْضِيحِ الْمَعَانِي الْعَمِيقَةِ فِي نُصُوصِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Pisci koriste metaforu kako bi objasnili duboka značenja u svojim tekstovima.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use metaphor to clarify deep meanings in their texts.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نَقْرَأُ النَّثْرَ الْأَدَبِيَّ، نَشْعُرُ بِقُوَّةِ الْكَلِمَاتِ وَتَرْتِيبِهَا الْمُنَظَّمِ.
sentences.translation: Kada čitamo književnu prozu, osjećamo snagu riječi i njihov organizovan raspored.
sentences.translationEn: When we read literary prose, we feel the power of words and their organized arrangement.

sentences.arabic: الْقِرَاءَةُ الْمُسْتَمِرَّةُ تُطَوِّرُ مَهَارَةَ الْكِتَابَةِ عِنْدَ الْمُتَعَلِّمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Kontinuirano čitanje razvija vještinu pisanja kod učenika.
sentences.translationEn: Continuous reading develops writing skills in learners.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ رِحْلَةٌ مُمْتِعَةٌ فِي عَالَمِ الْأَدَبِ الْوَاسِعِ.
sentences.translation: To je uživanje u širokom svijetu književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: It is an enjoyable journey into the vast world of literature.
